Who I Am

About Me

Utawala, Nairobi

Hey! I'm Telvin, a Computer Science student at the Catholic University of Eastern Africa, based in Nairobi, Kenya. I'm motivated, detail-oriented, and passionate about building real-world applications that solve actual problems.

I specialize in full-stack web development — crafting responsive frontends with HTML, CSS & JavaScript, and powering them with Python FastAPI and MySQL backends. I enjoy clean architecture, secure APIs, and making things work end-to-end.

Alongside coding, I bring strong project management, communication, and leadership skills. I'm currently seeking an attachment opportunity to grow in a professional environment. Fluent in both English and Swahili.

Projects

Real-world applications built from scratch — frontend to backend.

FastAPIMySQL JavaScriptPHP M-Pesa APIJWT Auth OpenStreetMap
Skyline Treats

A full-stack fast food ordering platform for a Nairobi restaurant. Features JWT authentication, M-Pesa & card payments, live cart, order tracking, an admin analytics dashboard, and a hardened Python FastAPI backend.

Live Demo GitHub
📊
PythonPandas MySQLAnalytics
Student Management Analytics

A data analytics system for managing and visualising student records and performance metrics. Built with Python and Pandas for data processing, with a MySQL backend and a clean dashboard for insights and reporting.
